name: Black Smear Poison
description:
Many calignis use a debilitating poison crafted from subterranean fungi.

Activate (3 Actions) Interact (Injury)

Saving Throw DC 16 Fortitude check

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 1d6 poison damage and Enfeebled 1 (1 round)

Stage 2 As stage 1

Stage 3 1d6 poison damage, and Enfeebled 2 (1 round)
